title: triumfetta geoides var. lanceolata
intro: Triumfetta geoides var. lanceolata, also known as Lanceolate Water Prelea or Trailing Water Prelea, is a flowering plant species in the family Malvaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in Asia and Africa, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Triumfetta geoides var. lanceolata include treating wounds, fever, and rheumatism, as well as providing relief from skin irritations and infections. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
